strengths: Clearly identifies three specific real-world objects with contextual details (date, ownership, manufacturer).
Consistently links each object to the chosen IA prompt about values shaping knowledge production.
Incorporates TOK concepts (perspective, bias, ethics) to support object justifications.
weaknesses: Analysis often remains descriptive and lacks sustained depth or evidence.
Some claims (e.g. âuniversal languageâ, corporate critique) are asserted without fully unpacking or sourcing.
Repetitive wording across objects and moral commentary occasionally drifts from precise TOK exploration.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The studentâs exhibition sits firmly at the top of the 5â6 band. All three objects are convincingly contextualized and tied to the prompt, with appropriate TOK terminology and supporting evidence in most cases. However, the commentary does not consistently achieve the depth, precision and TOK-level analysis required for the 7â8 band. Explanations remain at times descriptive rather than analytical, evidence is asserted rather than fully unfolded, and there is minor repetition. Awarding a score of 6 accurately reflects the solid performance across all strand descriptors while acknowledging areas for further depth and rigor.

annotations.comment: The selection of IA Prompt #35 and theme âLanguageâ is appropriate, but the header could more explicitly preview how each object will illustrate languageâs role in shaping values and knowledge.
The introduction defines language broadly but lacks a precise link to the TOK concepts of values influencing knowledge. Consider tightening this to foreshadow your analytical approach.
Fig. 1 is clearly presented and contextualized with date and author, strengthening real-world anchoring of your first object.
The description of Bruegelâs moral values is insightful, but could be enhanced by citing specific TOK terminology (e.g., âvalue-laden interpretationâ).

The commentary on perspective and ethics is descriptive rather than analytical. To deepen the link to the IA prompt, unpack how âuniversal languageâ functions as a knowledge conduit across cultures.
The idea of ethical knowledge is introduced but not fully evidenced. Consider incorporating a secondary source or TOK theory to support your claim.
Fig. 2 is clearly identified with provenance, which strengthens the real-world context for your second object.
The ringâs backstory is engaging, but the connection to language (semiotics) needs clearer articulation: define how symbols act as a âlanguageâ in knowledge production.
Your explanation of Christian values shaping the narrative is clear. To strengthen, reference a specific historianâs view on religious bias in historiography.
The term âvaluesâ is used aptly but could link more explicitly to knowledge questions about certainty and perspective.
The analysis of selection bias is insightful; consider deepening by contrasting with a counterexample where multiple religious narratives inform shared history.
The nod to Irish culture nuance is appropriate, but the assertion would benefit from evidence on contemporary Irish historiography or surveys.
Fig. 3 clearly anchors your third objectâs context with manufacturer and date details, supporting real-world connection.
The description of gendered marketing via colour is perceptive; link this more explicitly to language by discussing how colour functions as semiotic code.
The link to corporate profit is valid, but the TOK focus drifts into moral commentary. Ground your critique in knowledge production dynamics instead.
The concept of corporate uncertainty is intriguing; clarify how this uncertainty shapes consumer knowledge and affects broader societal values.
The concluding sentence summarizes objects neatly but stops short of drawing out a TOKâlevel knowledge question or synthesis across the three cases.
The works cited header is formatted clearly, but ensure consistency in font and indentation across entries.
Entries are listed non-alphabetically. For clarity and academic rigor, reorder the citations alphabetically by author or title.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
